calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-07-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yuji Mitani, via ZOOM, for Ruth Ying Hui Chen, Administrator.

The court notes the several filings made by counsel within the last few days, but the court advises that it would like clarification regarding the personal injury case against the Yellow Cab Co. Counsel provides history regarding the civil case against Yellow Cab and reports that initially, the award from the personal injury claim was to be $500,000 but that due to Yellow Cab filing for bankruptcy, the award was reduced to $190,000 of which only about ten percent was recovered but that the estate actually received $35,910. The court and counsel continue to discuss how the fees have been calculated with the court confirming that only $35,910 has been received by the estate and not $190,000.

After additional discussion, the Accounting Petition is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Mahoney. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yuji Mitani for Ruth Chen.

The Court stated that either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is needed. Status on close of estate is continued to September 9, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration.

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yuji Mitani for and with Ruth Chen (Administrator).

The Court noted that this matter is on calendar for filing of a response to the Probate Examiner's notes. Mr. Mitani stated that the hearing in June was taken off calendar, that he did not realize anything else was on calendar, that he was trying to refile the petition and do it properly, and that money is now coming in from the bankruptcy. Mr. Mitani also stated that he already filed a new petition with a hearing date of January 28th and that he will prepare a proof of service for the new date. The Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration is continued to January 28, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is off calendar.
